title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Should some of this be Canvas-integra
content:
✔ Should some of this be Canvas-integrated, and some Google Docs/Sheets?
✔ Should all class game elements be housed in one master “Game Hub” online?

2. Do we want a “chaos event” to be an automatic mid-semester trigger, or only triggered if conditions align?

✔ If automatic, it forces a major reset midway.
✔ If conditional, it only happens if students make specific choices.

3. Should students have limited “rerolls” per semester, or should they be item-based only?

✔ If limited, should they have one per month, or should they earn rerolls through XP?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 7.3. Finalizing structure. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 7.4 – Ingesting All Missing Rules & Locking In Next Steps


🚀 This iteration finalizes how we store data, picks the mid-semester chaos event week, sets reroll mechanics, and prepares to print ALL rules from every section developed.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 433 (chunk 433/555)
